rect.onclick: sendPrompt('What does DCGM Exporter DaemonSet do and how do I install it via GPU Operator?')
sendPrompt('Show me the Go project structure for the kubefisher CLI using Cobra')
sendPrompt('Show me the full KubeFisher labels and annotations contract in docs/contract.md')
sendPrompt('What Prometheus recording rules should KubeFisher ship for cost_per_token and cost_per_hour?')
sendPrompt('What Grafana panels does KubeFisher ship pre-built in its Helm chart?')
sendPrompt('Show me the Go cost patcher with PlatformAdapter interface for KubeFisher')
sendPrompt('Show me the TeamInferenceQuota kubebuilder CRD and reconcile loop')
sendPrompt('Show me the ValidatingWebhook that blocks GPU pod creation when TeamInferenceQuota is Exceeded')
sendPrompt('Show me the in-cluster agent Go binary that pushes cost metrics to the hosted dashboard')

svg.text: cost-patcher · PrometheusRules · Grafana dashboard · RBAC · GPU pricing ConfigMap
helm install kubefisher — works alongside any serving platform
